title: supports_ephemeral stays true if connect_ws fails after capability check
description: supports_ephemeral is set from ws_url.is_some() at SessionReady time. If the server advertises both capabilities but the WebSocket upgrade subsequently fails (and keeps failing through all retries), AppState.supports_ephemeral stays true while typing indicators never arrive. The UI would show typing indicator UI with nothing in it — the original silent-degradation problem, but only in the upgrade-failure case. Fix is a WsNotification::PermanentFailure variant that flips the flag. Explicitly out of scope for this epic; filed for follow-up.
